fixes_detail.description: EOD documentation: 7th consecutive morning window missed. Restart is P0 above all other tasks. Cumulative alpha $1,624-3,274.
Gate=5% A/B probe: -2pt confidence adjustment on 80-90% bin. Realized WR = 60% (25pt gap from stated 80-90% confidence). Upper calibration bins completely unaddressed by existing rules.
fixes_detail.expected_impact: Probe at gate=5% to measure impact on high-conf signal survival. Graduate to gate=20% with -4pt if WR improves post n=20.

new_findings_this_run.detail: 7th consecutive morning window missed. Bot offline 623.8h. All 14 A/B probes stalled at treatment_wr=null. Learning backlog compounds daily.

80-90% confidence signals = 60% WR (25pt gap). 90%+ = 56% WR (34pt gap). Existing calibration rules only address 60-70% bin. Upper bins are the most dangerous — bot bets most on its worst-calibrated signals.
new_findings_this_run.action: HIGH_CONF_UPPER_BIN_CALIBRATION_PROBE at gate=5% live. Monitor on restart.

execution_forensics.high_priority_finding: EXIT_PROACTIVE_CLOSE_PRIORITY (conf=93): 93.3% of SL hits preventable via proactive early close. $1,140.13 recoverable across 134 trades. SOL_short most impactful ($614.80, 30 scenarios). Dev: exit_agent threshold reduction from 80% to 65% confidence to trigger close.
execution_forensics.new_this_run: No new execution data. EXIT_PROACTIVE_CLOSE_PRIORITY (conf=93, gate=0%) identified as highest-value execution forensics finding. HYPE_RULE_NOT_WIRED (conf=85) confirmed as critical: if HYPE_EV_CONFIRMED_NEGATIVE not wired in OrderExecutor, restart will immediately execute HYPE at full size on known-losing setups.

live_injection.new_this_run: HIGH_CONF_CALIBRATION_DRIFT escalated: injection edge data shows ETH_SHORT+trending = 80% WR but this uses 80%+ confidence signals which are actually only 60% WR. The calibration gap means edge WR estimates are systematically inflated by ~20pp for high-confidence setups. Live injection update: weight ETH+trending on regime quality, not raw confidence value.
live_injection.calibration_warning: All WR estimates for high-confidence setups (80%+) should be mentally discounted by ~20pp until calibration probe graduates.
live_injection.top_edge_unchanged: ETH_SHORT+trending+morning (~80% stated WR, realistically ~60% WR post-calibration)
